subject: Nincada, the Trainee Pokemon — Hoenn Bug/Ground-type small white insect larva depicted partially emerging from soil near roots
description: A small pale insect-like creature is depicted partially at or just above ground level, surrounded by visible tree roots and soil. The creature has a white rounded body with small limbs and antennae, giving it a larval appearance. The background shows exposed root structures and dark earth, consistent with its subterranean Pokedex description. The creature appears to be resting or slowly moving near the root system, its antennae the primary sensory feature emphasized by the composition.
foreground: small white larval insect near tree roots and soil
background: dark soil and tree root structures
